title: Eva OST question
wikitext:
[]: Eva OST question             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Thu Oct 22, 2009 7:34 am After getting all the Eva soundtracks I noticed that some songs where ones i'd never heard in the anime such as "Yokan". Also I noticed that they didn't include the Asuka mind fudge or Eva version of Ode to joy [one of the best songs in the series]. Why is that?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 22, 2009 8:35 am Because then it wouldn't be an original soundtrack. Duh.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Oct 22, 2009 9:03 am Yokan is the preview music

[]: Re: Eva OST question             Quote Post by ath » Thu Oct 22, 2009 9:07 am Eva Naut wrote: Also I noticed that they didn't include the Asuka mind fudge or Eva version of Ode to joy [one of the best songs in the series]. Why is that?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 22, 2009 9:21 am Xard wrote: Yokan is the preview music

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Naut » Thu Oct 22, 2009 9:43 am So does "addition" have the "Ode to joy" track?

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Thu Oct 22, 2009 9:52 am Eva Naut wrote: So does "addition" have the "Ode to joy" track?
